added.description: Scaffold `autodoc.json` automatically during `autodoc --init` based on `lib/src/` structure using shared scaffolding logic

changed.description: Complete `.cicd_runs` → `.runtime_ci/runs` path migration in CLI tools, agent scripts, and prompt files

fixed.description: Fix `autodoc --init` failing or acting as a no-op, now correctly scaffolds `autodoc.json` and closes issue #2
Fix heredoc JSONEOF terminator indentation in `gemini_changelog_prompt.dart` to prevent `tee` from hanging
Fix retry log message in `autodoc_command.dart` (now properly generic instead of claiming `Rate limited` for all errors) and fix environment spread consistency
